summary: The current UUID standard, obsoleting RFC 4122: defines the 128-bit layout, the variant and version fields, and generation algorithms for versions 1-8, including the name-based v3 (MD5) and v5 (SHA-1) constructions over a namespace UUID concatenated with a name, and the new time-ordered v6/v7. Provides test vectors for each version that implementations reproduce.
title: Universally Unique IDentifiers (UUIDs)
